title: Defense Evasion Technique Detected
description: Detects defense evasion techniques including log deletion, audit daemon tampering and history file clearing.
author: SOC Team
aql: LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (payload ILIKE '%base64%' OR payload ILIKE '%/dev/tcp%' OR payload ILIKE '%mkfifo%' OR payload ILIKE '%0>&1%')
